title: fields
description: All available fields in service. FID = Field ID Number.

BID_1.description: The last bid price or last bid price in an interval. FID # 100

BID_VOL_1.description: The volume of the last bid in an interval. FID # 104

BID_EXCH_1.description: The volume of the last bid or last bid in an interval. FID # 107. Enumeration Table 7

ASK_1.description: The last ask price or last ask price in an interval. FID # 200

ASK_VOL_1.description: The volume of the last ask or last ask in an interval. FID # 204

ASK_EXCH_1.description: The exchange of the last ask or last ask in an interval. FID # 207. Enumeration Table 7.

LAST_1.description: The last trade price or last trade price in an interval. FID # 300

LAST_DATE_1.description: The date of the last trade or last trade in an interval. FID # 301

LAST_TIME_1.description: The time of the last trade or last trade in an interval. FID # 302

LAST_VOL_1.description: The trade volume, or the sum of all trade volumes inside a bin. FID # 304

LAST_EXCH_1.description: The exchange of the last trade or last trade in an interval. FID # 307. Enumeration Table 7

CUM_VOL.description: The symbol's daily cumulative volume, or the last cumulative volume in an interval. FID # 601

VWAP.description: The daily volume weighted average price, or the last VWAP in an interval. FID # 603

OPEN_1.description: The first trade of an interval. FID # 710

HIGH_1.description: The highest trade price in an interval. FID # 720

LOW_1.description: The lowest trade price in an interval. FID # 723
